ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defense) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the team expires */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Summary of the player's past injuries and recovery times */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team competes in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's assistant coach */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league's president */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of successful passes */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the player's performance */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Numerical rating of the player's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who generated the report */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* URL to a video clip of the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player attending the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the training (e.g., shooting, defense) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., practice match, skills drill) */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* URL to a video clip of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Estimated return date to play */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  "rehab_plan" TEXT /* Detailed rehabilitation plan */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer handling the rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (could be a coach or analyst) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback about the player's performance */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Numerical rating of the player's performance */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* URL to a video clip of the player's performance during the review period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
